---
title: "Sunholo Multivac: Your AI Platform"
subtitle: "Accelerating AI from Concept to Production"
author: "Mark Edmondson"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, custom.scss]
    logo: simple/sunholo-logo.svg
    slide-number: true
    preview-links: auto
    transition: slide
    transition-speed: fast
    footer: "© 2025 Holosun ApS - Confidential"
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    geometry:
      - top=1in
      - bottom=1in
      - left=1in
      - right=1in
---

## The AI Implementation Challenge {.center}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
### Many organizations struggle with:
- AI prototypes that won't scale
- Technical complexity beyond internal capabilities  
- Months of infrastructure development
- Integration with existing systems
- Security and compliance concerns
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Leading to:
- Delayed time-to-market
- Increased costs
- Lost competitive advantage
- Frustrated stakeholders
- Abandoned AI initiatives
:::
::::

::: {.notes}
Many organizations have promising AI ideas but struggle to implement them at scale. The gap between prototype and production is where most AI initiatives fail.
:::

---

## Introducing Sunholo Multivac {.center background-color="#e73c17"}

:::: {.r-fit-text}
**Your Complete AI Platform**

Skip months of infrastructure development with our pre-built AI platform
::::

::: {.fragment}
- **Enterprise-ready** out of the box
- **Framework agnostic** - works with any AI model
- **Scales** from zero to billions of events
- **Deploy anywhere** - cloud or on-premise
:::

---

## What Multivac Provides {.smaller}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="33%"}
### Authentication & Security
- Built-in user management
- Enterprise SSO integration
- Role-based access control
- Confidential data handling
- Audit trails
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
### Infrastructure & Scale
- Auto-scaling architecture
- Load balancing
- High availability
- Disaster recovery
- Multi-region support
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
### AI Operations
- Model deployment pipeline
- Version management
- Evaluation framework
- Performance monitoring
- Cost optimization
:::
::::

---

## Key Business Benefits {.center}

```{mermaid}
%%{init: {'theme':'base', 'themeVariables': { 'primaryColor':'#e73c17', 'primaryTextColor':'#fff', 'primaryBorderColor':'#e73c17', 'lineColor':'#5b5b5b', 'secondaryColor':'#314352', 'tertiaryColor':'#f6f8fa'}}}%%
graph LR
    A[AI Concept] --> B[Multivac Platform]
    B --> C[Production AI]
    
    D[Weeks not Months] --> B
    E[Lower Risk] --> B
    F[Proven Architecture] --> B
    
    style A fill:#f6f8fa,stroke:#314352,stroke-width:2px
    style B fill:#e73c17,stroke:#e73c17,stroke-width:3px,color:#fff
    style C fill:#314352,stroke:#314352,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
```

--- 

## Key Business Benefits 

::: {.fragment}
### Accelerated Time-to-Market
Launch AI solutions in **weeks instead of months**
:::

::: {.fragment}
### Reduced Technical Risk
**Enterprise-grade** infrastructure from day one
:::

::: {.fragment}
### Focus on Value Creation
Your team focuses on **AI innovation**, not infrastructure
:::

---

## Real-World Success Stories

## ESRS Reporting: Document Processing

Use Case: AI Extraction of line items from documents at scale

> Build to scale: 100M documents per financial quarter
> Reduce processing time x500 - 70 days to 24hours
> Increase accuracy of extraction ~50% to 80%
> Reduce cost x10 - 1M dkk per run to 100k dkk per run

## Green Energy Contract assistant

Creation of Aitana, an AI assistant for legal green energy industry

> Idea to working POC within 2 weeks
> TBs of Private and confidential document handling
> Creation of intelligent contract assistant agents
> Web UI and API endpoints

## AI Infrastructure setup

Seeding cloud infrastructure for AI content creator

> Deploymnt of existing modules to clients cloud
> Setting up best practice AI and developer resources
> Advisory and support for scaling AI created SEO-optimised content

---

## What We Do vs. What We Don't Do

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
### ✅ **We Focus On:**
- **Delivering** production-ready AI systems
- **Engineering** scalable solutions
- **Integrating** with existing infrastructure
- **Optimizing** performance and costs
- **Deploying** and maintaining AI applications
- **Solving** technical implementation challenges
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### ❌ **We Don't Do:**
- AI inspiration workshops
- Brainstorming AI ideas
- Business case development
- Use case identification
- Strategic AI consulting
- Innovation theater
:::
::::

::: {.callout-important}
**We partner with organizations that know what they want to build**
:::

---

## Our Proven Process

### 1. Technical Assessment
Analyze your AI prototype and infrastructure

### 2. Architecture Design  
Create scalable solution using Multivac

### 3. Implementation
Build and integrate components

### 4. Testing & Optimization
Ensure reliability and performance

### 5. Deployment & Support
Launch and maintain your AI system

---

## Technology Stack {.center}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
### AI Frameworks
- Langchain, Langgraph, CrewAI, etc.
- Gemini, OpenAI, Claude, Deepseek, etc.
- MCP, A2A, ADK, etc.
- And more...
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Infrastructure
- Cloud Native
- Microservices
- Infrastructre as Code
- Auto-documentation
- Self-healing
- And more...
:::
::::

:::
**Framework Agnostic**: Multivac works with your preferred AI tools
:::

---

## Investment & ROI {.center background-color="#314352"}

### Typical AI Infrastructure Build
- 6-12 months development time
- €500K - €2M in engineering costs
- Ongoing maintenance burden
- Technical debt accumulation

### With Sunholo Multivac
- 2-4 weeks to production
- Predictable monthly costs
- Maintained and updated platform
- Focus your resources on AI value creation

---

## Partnership Options

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
### Multivac Cloud
- Fully managed service
- No infrastructure overhead
- Automatic updates
- Pay-as-you-grow pricing
- Ideal for fast deployment
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Self-Hosted
- Deploy in your cloud
- Complete data control
- Customizable architecture
- Annual licensing
- Full ownership
:::
::::

::: {.fragment}
### Plus: AI Engineering Support
Expert engineers to help implement your specific AI use cases
:::

---

## Why Sunholo Multivac?

### Deep Technical Expertise
Specialized in **production AI systems**, not just prototypes

### Proven Track Record
Deep focus on AI Engineering since 2023

### Cloud Native
Certified expertise in **Cloud Deployments** with fully modern tech-stack

### Focus on Delivery
We measure success by **your AI in production**, not billable hours

---

## Next Steps {background-color="#e73c17"}

### 1. Schedule a Technical Assessment
Consultation to discuss your AI project

### 2. Solution Design
Specific recommendations for your use case

### 3. Start Building
Begin implementation within days

::: {.fragment}
**Contact**: multivac@sunholo.com
:::

---

## Appendix: Common Questions

### Q: How is this different from other AI platforms?
**A:** Multivac offers bespoke integrations using its own platform to tailor deployments. We focus on the "last mile" of AI deployment.

### Q: What if we need help with the AI models themselves?
**A:** Our AI Engineering team can help optimize, integrate, and deploy your models as part of our service offering.

### Q: Can we start small and scale?
**A:** Absolutely. Multivac scales from prototype to enterprise seamlessly.

---

## Thank You

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="60%"}
### Ready to accelerate your AI initiatives?

Contact us at:
**multivac@sunholo.com**

Visit:
**sunholo.com**

Connect on LinkedIn:
**linkedin.com/company/sunholo**
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
![](simple/sunholo-logo.svg){width=200}
:::
::::

::: {.notes}
Thank you for your time. We look forward to helping you bridge the gap between AI ambition and reality.
:::
